title: Biome Vote
description: Meerkats and oases in the desert.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RaCma1hWNdY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Improves biomes in the game based on the features presented in the Biome Vote.

# Desert
## Meerkats
*Meerkat Burrows* are a new structure found in deserts. A few meerkats will spawn around each burrow.

When it sees a scary mob, the meerkat will burrow into the sand:

![Meerkat peeking out of the sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db0ac28ec99337350e3398986ab394531eea49fc.jpeg)

They'll check every few seconds for danger and pop back out if its clear.

## Oasis
Find an *Oasis* in the desert for a source of fresh water, plants, and the occasional *Palm Tree*.

![An oasis in the desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8da5bb4743faeea10ae0a86bae26ead89a5b8f19.jpeg)
